context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Sleep state during designated sleep hours (12-hour cycle)
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, on perch at y=80
context.usage_scenario: Active during sleep time set by player, no care interactions available during this state

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head tucked into feathers, rounded sleeping posture
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: head fully tucked, Frame 2: subtle breathing expansion, Frame 3: breathing contraction

visual_specification.details: Eyes completely hidden (no visible eye pixels), head buried in body feathers, crest flattened against head, body appears more rounded/puffed up by 2-3px, cheek patch partially obscured but still visible, tail feathers relaxed downward

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (eyes visible), all other states (head position and posture completely different)

explicit_negations: No eyes visible at all (not even closed eyelids)
No snoring visual beyond ZZZ particles (handled separately)
